rationale: The skill provisions a Prisma Postgres database via curl calls to api.prisma.io, then configures a local Node.js project. It reads/writes .env, .gitignore, prisma/schema.prisma, prisma.config.ts and package.json, installs npm packages (hitting registry.npmjs.org), and runs npx prisma migrate/generate which writes prisma/migrations and generated client files. Step 7 explicitly creates and then deletes test-connection.ts after running it via npx tsx, and references/*.md files are read for guidance.
